description: A mining company has confirmed a series of blasts near the Biak station in Indonesia. You need to correct the classification of these events in the SeisComP database. Update the metadata for all events within the mining zone bounding box (Latitude -1.70 to -1.50, Longitude 116.00 to 116.20) to Type: 'quarry blast', Certainty: 'known', and Description: 'Biak Mine Verification' (ensuring an EventDescription record is created or updated for each event). Do not modify any events outside this geographic box. You may use direct SQL via MariaDB (mysql -u sysop -psysop seiscomp) or the SeisComP API. The scmaster service is running and a terminal is available.
